headline: Unifying Developer Workflows With Nostr-Compatible Relays
lede: Buzz reconstructs team collaboration by treating every git event and agent task as a cryptographically signed entry in a shared log. This Rust-based substrate eliminates fragmented toolchains for teams seeking total auditability.

headline: Real-Time Global Intel Through High-Fidelity Dashboards
lede: World Monitor leverages a dual-map engine and edge-computing to synthesize thousands of geopolitical feeds into a cohesive intelligence stream. It provides researchers with a private, high-density interface for tracking market volatility and global events.

headline: A Standardized Registry for Claude Agentic Skills
lede: This repository curates modular instruction sets that transform AI from simple chatbots into high-utility agents. It serves as a definitive resource for engineering teams building interoperable automation workflows across the modern LLM ecosystem.

headline: Rust-Powered Minecraft Server Architecture
lede: Pumpkin rebuilds the Minecraft server foundation with memory-safe concurrency and extreme CPU efficiency. It provides administrators a modular, high-performance alternative to traditional Java-based infrastructure.

headline: Specialized Foundation Models for Financial Time-Series Forecasting
lede: Kronos introduces a discrete tokenization strategy for OHLCV financial data, enabling Transformer-based market prediction at scale. This research-grade framework provides quantitative traders with a robust pipeline for custom fine-tuning and inference.

headline: Local-First Grammar Checking With Harper
lede: Harper delivers millisecond text analysis entirely offline, eliminating the latency and data exposure inherent in cloud-based writing assistants. Its modular Rust core provides a high-speed, privacy-first alternative for power users and developers.

headline: Architecture-as-Code for Living System Documentation
lede: LikeC4 treats complex software diagrams as versionable code, ensuring documentation never drifts from reality. Its CLI-driven approach allows architects to programmatically generate interactive system views directly from their repository.

headline: Dedicated Browsing Environments for Multi-Agent Collaboration
lede: Ego Lite separates AI agent browser sessions into isolated spaces to prevent navigation collisions during complex tasks. This project transforms browser capabilities into addressable functions for more efficient, multi-step automation.

headline: Keyboard-Driven File Management for the Modern CLI
lede: Superfile brings a polished, plugin-ready interface to terminal-based file navigation. Designed for performance, it allows developers to streamline their daily workflows through intuitive, customizable hotkeys.

headline: Spatial Presence Sensing Using Commodity WiFi Signals
lede: RuView transforms inexpensive ESP32 chips into sophisticated diagnostic sensors by analyzing radio wave disturbances. This privacy-focused mesh system offers high-fidelity presence and vital-sign monitoring without the need for cameras.
